de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class EnhancedForElimination

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ProgramTransformer
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.EnhancedForElimination
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, SVSubstitute

    public class EnhancedForElimination
extends ProgramTransformer
    This class defines a meta operator to resolve an enhanced for loop - by transformation to a "normal" loop. This class is used to transform an enh. for loop over an iterable object into a while loop + surrounding statements.
    Author:
    mulbrich, bruns

    • Constructor Detail

      • EnhancedForElimination

    • Method Detail

      • transform

        public ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe,
                                Services services,
                                SVInstantiations svInst)
        An enhanced for loop is executed by transforming it into a "normal" for loop. For an enhanced for "for(type var : exp) stm" the fields of LoopStatement are used as follows:
        • inits: type var
        • guard: exp
        • updates remains empty
        • body: stm

        Loops over arrays are treated by a taclet without use of this class.

        Loops over Iterable-objects are treated by this meta-construct.

        The rules which use this meta construct must ensure that exp is of type Iterable.

        Specified by:
        transform in class ProgramTransformer
        Parameters:
        pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
        services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
        svInst - the instantiations of the schemavariables
        Returns:
        the transformated program
        See Also:
        #makeIterableForLoop(LocalVariableDeclaration, Expression, Statement), ProgramTransformer.transform(de.uka.ilkd.key.java.ProgramElement, de.uka.ilkd.key.java.Services, de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.inst.SVInstantiations)

      • isIterable

        private boolean isIterable(Expression expression,
                           Services services)
        Checks if an expression is an Iterable.
        Parameters:
        expression - the expression to check
        services - the services for lookups
        Returns:
        true, if expression's type is a subtype of Iterable
